sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44571" key="eu)/numfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔνυμφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44571.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a fair bride</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λέχος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.175</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
